title: camptosema scarlatinum var. pohlianum
intro: Camptosema scarlatinum var. pohlianum, also known as Red Campion or Scarlet Campion, is a plant species belonging to the Bignoniaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and bronchodilatory properties. Camptosema scarlatinum var. pohlianum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
